daedalus.description: manufacturers, C94D93FC4FB03DF149FE3EB9C1F1DDEA, Pew pew, daddy's home.

jakobs.description: manufacturers, D5C55F6B4E9D26683AC5AF842B8B4B03, When you reach for the iron on your hip, you're not looking for complications—you're looking to simplify. Jakobs offers simple, high caliber firearms so you don't have to think, or fire, twice.

maliwan.description: manufacturers, 584B1B504A8054B569D564896C7C705B, With their sleek designs, high-tech elemental weapons, and new dual-elemental technology, changing your weapon's element is easy as a click of a button. Maliwan dominates the marketplace of young urban professional killers by providing not just a product, but a lifestyle. Form and function.

order.description: manufacturers, 45F27FA8473F83DFD50DF4A1782CBEDA, Ruling with an iron and fashionable fist.

tediore.description: manufacturers, B4D4F69241C8B37DB04D09AF4FFF174C, At Tediore, we've made reloading a gun easier than ever. When you're done firing, simply discard the weapon in your enemy's direction to deal additional damage, and a new weapon is instantly digistructed in the palm of your hand.

torgue.description: manufacturers, EE8356624E6DDCD5485BDEB27D6A0D14, Most guns shoot tiny pieces of metal powered by tiny explosions. Torgue says F**K THAT, we shoot MORE EXPLOSIONS, and make them BIGGER! BUY TORGUE, BLOW S**T UP.

vladof.description: manufacturers, DC2F50024BFC5F5A8608A5B2F3C234AE, When the boots of oppressors sound, all workers must answer the call to resist. Vladof—the instrument of the Revolution—provides unparalleled fire rate, to bury the bourgeois beneath a mountain of lead. Overthrow even more oppressors with Vladof's under-barrel weapon mount technology, because two guns in one is better than one.
